articles.title: One in six young people will not be in work or training in five years without action, report warns
articles.description: A major review examining the causes of rising youth unemployment says getting on the career ladder is now "out of reach" for many.

articles.title: I just want freedom from fear, says girl raped by teenage boys as sentences to be reviewed
articles.description: The teenager tells BBC Newsnight she is suffering from flashbacks and living in fear following the attack.

articles.title: Girl tells BBC she is 'scared to go out' after teenage rapists spared jail time
articles.description: She told BBC Newsnight she was living in fear after the attack by teenage boys, whose sentences are being reviewed.

articles.title: US strikes Iran targets for second time in three days
articles.description: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.
